title: Dekton 50 Pcs Screwdriver Set -8 Pcs Screwdrivers | 1 Pc Bit Adaptor | 8pcs Precision Screwdrivers 32 Pcs Bits | 1 Pc Magnetize Demagnetize | Made from Carbon Steel | Precision & Slotted Heads
features: Comprehensive 50-Piece Set: The Dekton 50 Pcs Screwdriver Set is an all-in-one solution for your DIY and professional needs. It includes 8 standard screwdrivers, 8 precision screwdrivers, 32 bits, a bit adaptor, and a magnetize/demagnetize tool, providing you with everything you need for various fastening and repair tasks.

32 High-Quality Bits: The set includes 32 bits that are compatible with the provided bit adaptor, allowing you to tackle a wide range of screw types and sizes. These bits are crafted from high-quality materials to ensure longevity and reliability during use, making it easy to handle various fastening tasks.

Magnetize/Demagnetize Tool: This set comes with a magnetize/demagnetize tool that allows you to customize the magnetic properties of your screwdrivers and bits. This feature is especially useful for handling small screws and keeping them securely in place during work, reducing the risk of dropping or losing them.

Bit Adaptor Included: The included bit adaptor is designed for quick and easy switching between bits, enhancing your efficiency and productivity. This adaptor is compatible with the 32 bits, ensuring seamless transitions between different sizes and types of screws.

Durable Carbon Steel Construction: All screwdrivers and bits in the Dekton set are made from high-quality carbon steel, known for its durability and resistance to wear. The carbon steel construction ensures that the tools maintain their sharpness and strength over time, providing reliable performance for various applications.
description: Dekton 50 Pcs Screwdriver Set – The ultimate toolkit for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, this comprehensive set includes everything you need for precision work and everyday repairs. Featuring 8 durable screwdrivers, 1 bit adaptor, 8 precision screwdrivers, and 32 versatile bits, this set ensures you have the right tool for any job. Each screwdriver is engineered from high-quality carbon steel, offering exceptional strength, durability, and resistance to wear. The set includes a range of slotted and precision heads to handle various tasks with ease, making it perfect for electronics, machinery, and general household repairs. The included bit adaptor provides seamless compatibility with the 32 bits, allowing for quick and efficient changes between different bit types. This adaptability is further enhanced by the precision screwdrivers, which are ideal for intricate and detailed work. To maintain optimal tool performance, the set also includes a magnetize/demagnetize tool, which allows you to easily magnetize or demagnetize your screwdrivers and bits as needed, ensuring a secure grip on screws and preventing the loss of small components. Each screwdriver in the set is ergonomically designed with a comfortable, non-slip handle that provides a secure grip and reduces hand fatigue during extended use. The carbon steel construction ensures that the tools are both robust and resistant to corrosion, while the precision-machined tips deliver a perfect fit in screw heads to prevent stripping and ensure maximum torque.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎• 8pc screwdriver: Slotted: 6 x 38mm, 5 x 75mm, 6 x 100mm, 8 x 150mm. Phillips: PH2 x 38mm, PH1 x 75mm, PH2 x 100mm, PH3 x 150mm. • 8pc precision screwdrivers: Slotted: 2.0, 2.5, 3.0. Phillips: PH00, PH0. Torx: T6, T8, T10. • 32pc bits: Slotted: 3, 4, 5, 6mm. Phillips: PH0, PH1, PH2, PH3. Pozi: PZ0, PZ1, PZ2, PZ3. Torx: T8, T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40. Hex: 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5 ,5, 5.5, 6mm • 1pc magnetize & damagnetize. • 1pc bit adaptor
